flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Pittsburgh-Pittsburgh Campus rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 ($21.5k → $23.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Pittsburgh-Pittsburgh Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Pittsburgh-Pittsburgh Campus are 23% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($66.1k vs $53.8k).
